top_signals.title: Shipping Industry Leaders Condemn Recent Attacks on Seafarers
top_signals.summary: BIMCO, the International Chamber of Shipping (ICS), INTERCARGO and INTERTANKO unanimously condemns recent attacks on seafarers and commercial shipping in and around the Strait of Hormuz. According to the International Maritime Organization (IMO)…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Musk Becomes the World's First Trillionaire
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk has reached trillionaire status with the IPO of his company SpaceX. Bloomberg News ran the numbers — here's what he could theoretically do with all that money  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The quantum computing revolution is closer than you think
top_signals.summary: Companies are betting on big implications for pharmaceuticals, financial services and crypto. But sceptics worry about hype
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
